response.overview: Dick Dorm 8 features real submitted dorm room footage from actual college students. A dick party is a party when a night of truth or dare in the dorm rooms turns into one big sex filled orgy. What do you do when you are broke? It's not uncommon in college studios, but these guys figured out they could make some quick money and have some fun at the same time. It's not gay if you're getting paid, right? One thing you learn in the dorms is that you don't mess with your roommate, lucky these bunk buddies have a surefire way of settling their differences. Hockey guys are tough as they can get, that's why it didn't surprise us when this group of college hockey players decided to welcome the new rookie to the team with a sex video!
response.title: Dick Dorm 8
